title: LPG shortage forces eateries in Velankanni to scale down menu
content: With tourist operators offering only basic services, there has been sharp decline in the arrival of tourists at one of the most popular catholic pilgrim centres

title: Hyderabad gets static allocation in 2026-27 budget despite expanded region
content: The 2026-27 budget shows minimal change in allocations after the tri-corporation area was renamed as Core Urban Region, with most GHMC figures retained, major funds going to infrastructure projects, and reduced allocations for disaster response, MMTS and heritage authority works.

title: High-end car performs ‘spinning’ stunt at Anil Kumble circle, driver booked
content: In the video, a white Lamborghini car is seen arriving at Anil Kumble Circle, performing a stunt and subsequently doing ‘donuts’, i.e. circling, at the junction.

title: Congress reiterates its position of asking Modi govt. to condemn U.S-Israel aerial assault on Iran
content: Has the PM used his much-claimed friendship with the US president and the Israeli PM to bring about a cease-fire? The answer is NO, says Congress leader Jairam Ramesh in a post on X

title: Assembly election LIVE: BJP out to claim its share in Bihar: Prashant Kishor on Nitish's exit as CM
content: The Election Commission of India announces the completion of the first randomisation of EVMs and VVPATs in Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Kunhalikutty files nomination in Malappuram
content: In a rare demonstration of communal harmony and secularism, the IUML leader’s electoral security deposit was jointly given by three persons representing different communities

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Thrissur braces for a three-cornered thriller with no easy winner in sight
content: Assembly dominance, local body numbers and Lok Sabha momentum collide in a constituency that could redefine the political mood in Kerala

title: PM Modi speaks to Iran President; stresses on freedom of navigation, ensuring shipping lanes open
content: The prime minister also appreciated Iran's continued support for the safety and security of Indian nationals in Iran

title: NHRC mandates teams of doctors from multiple institutions for custodial death autopsies
content: Further, it has also mandated that: “All doctors doing post-mortem must be holding a postgraduate degree in forensic medicine and must have at least an experience of five years in the specialty of post-mortem examination.”

title: Tribal council chiefs enter Assam electoral fray
content: Sewli Mohilary, the wife of the Chief Executive Member of the Bodoland Territorial Council Hagrama Mohilary is the BPF candidate from Kokrajhar constituency

title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu calls for transforming TTD temples into advanced spiritual hubs
content: The Chief Minister emphasised the importance of proactive governance in ensuring a seamless and hassle-free pilgrimage. He directed the officials to further strengthen systems capable of anticipating potential inconveniences to devotees and addressing them in real time

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Ali’s sixth-term bid faces hurdle in Mankada as LDF weighs support for IUML rebel
content: With IUML former constituency president Kunnath Mohammed entering the fray as Independent candidate, the LDF, which had earlier announced M.P. Alavi as its candidate, is reportedly reconsidering its strategy

title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu inaugurates food analysis laboratory in Tirumala
content: The facility routinely collects samples from multiple sources and conducts rigorous testing, including those used in the preparation of Srivari Prasadam and Anna Prasadam

title: In pictures | Id brings smiles, yet stirs scars for many
content: From festive gatherings, bustling markets and shared meals to visits to graves in war-scarred regions, Id is observed in contrasting realities

title: Himachal CM Sukhu presents ₹54,928 crore budget for FY27; blames scrapping of RDG for ₹8,000 crore loss
content: The Chief Minister started his budget presentation by accusing the BJP for not supporting the State’s interests; Milk procurement price hiked by ₹10

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: The Left grapples with shifting loyalties
content: Ahead of the 2026 Assembly polls, six former legislators, four from the CPI(M) and two from the CPI, severed their communist ties and are now gearing up to contest from the rival camps or as Independents. The happenings, rather uncommon in Kerala, have garnered much attention.

title: Fuel crisis deepens distress in hospitality, migrant sectors in Kerala
content: A significant number of migrant workers return to home States, several of which are heading into elections, as establishments shut down operations

title: Kerala polls: Ex-CPI(M) Minister G. Sudhakaran files papers as ‘people’s Independent’ in Ambalappuzha
content: G. Sudhakaran, who had broken his six-decade-old association with CPI(M) after feeling “discriminated against” that he was not given a term waiver accorded to other leaders for contesting Assembly polls, has set the stage for a riveting electoral battle with his one-time protege H. Salam

title: Death of trainee vet in hippo attack; Probe to find who asked her to enter enclosure
content: The family members, who visited Shivamogga, questioned why the officers at the zoo allowed the trainee officer to enter the hippopotamus enclosure on the night of March 19 in the absence of seniors

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI(M) meeting to decide on seat-sharing with DMK
content: The CPI(M), part of the DMK alliance, has not been able to finalise seat-sharing with the DMK, as the ruling party is not willing to increase the number of seats beyond five

title: ‘It is necessary to create a better understanding of dolphins among communities’
content: Researcher Imran Samad’s new short film on the endangered Indian Ocean humpback dolphins of Goa draws attention to these intelligent, highly social animals

title: Sagar tahsildar files FIR against staff for attempting to alter records; Shivamogga DC appeals to public to be cautious
content: The tahsildar filed a complaint with the Sagar Town Police Station against the staff and sought an investigation into the allegations

title: Won’t allow BJP to snatch voting rights, will fight till end: Mamata Banerjee
content: The TMC supremo alleged that the SIR exercise, which the ruling party claimed had led to large-scale deletions of voter names, was part of a "broader attempt" to influence the electoral process in the State

title: Untreated waste, poor civic infra mar Erode (East) Assembly constituency
content: Pollution, traffic congestion, and poor urban infrastructure remain key concerns for voters, who are looking for concrete outcomes

title: International Day of Forests 2026 | Theme, significance and economic importance of forest ecosystems
content: “Forests and Economies” has been selected as the theme for International Day of Forests 2026, highlighting the role of forests in supporting livelihoods and generating economic opportunities across sectors

title: Kerala Assembly polls: V.D. Satheesan praises G. Sudhakaran as ‘a just administrator’
content: Kerala’s Leader of the Opposition says G. Sudhakaran was the only member of LDF Cabinet between 2006 and 2011 who was spared of corruption allegations raised by him, and one for whom he had the ‘utmost respect’

title: Suspected kidnapping bid on son of Himachal CM's aide, unknown persons booked
content: According to reports, the incident occurred late Friday (March 20) evening when Aryan Chauhan, who is also the general secretary of Himachal Pradesh Youth Congress, was going to Shimla from his hotel in Mashobra.

title: Fury fizzles: How Trump's Iran ops has spiralled in face of a defiant Tehran - 10 key points
content: Operation Epic Fury, a swift US-Israeli strike targeting Iran's leadership, has unexpectedly morphed into a 22-day attritional war. Despite initial successes, Iran's resilience and regional escalation have caught Washington off guard, turning a planned quick victory into a protracted quagmire with no clear endgame and significant global economic implications.

title: Centre raises LPG allocation to 50%, urges PNG shift - who gets priority?
content: The central government has boosted gas allocation to states and Union Territories, raising it to 50% of pre-crisis levels. An additional 20% supply, effective March 23, will prioritize sectors like restaurants, hotels, and food processing to support public welfare and food supply chains.

title: 'CSK don't have 4 IND captains, MI do': Why Pathan picked Mumbai as greatest IPL team
content: Former India pacer Irfan Pathan believes Mumbai Indians edge out Chennai Super Kings as the IPL's greatest team, highlighting MI's significant contribution of match-winners to the Indian squad. Pathan also noted that the upcoming IPL season will be a crucial learning phase for young batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who faces increased scrutiny from opposition bowlers.

title: ‘Winter is coming,’ spring is not: Why India’s Rituraj is losing its throne
content: India's cherished spring, once a gentle interlude, is rapidly vanishing.  Winters are warming, heat arrives earlier, and the transition season is shrinking, impacting cultural traditions and agriculture.  Recent years show a disturbing pattern of early heatwaves and record temperatures, signalling a profound shift in the climate. This loss affects not just weather but the very rhythm of life.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX sends email to FCC, says: Reject Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin application
content: SpaceX has formally responded to Amazon's FCC petition against its satellite data center proposal. SpaceX argues that if Amazon's criticisms are applied, they must also be applied to Blue Origin's similar satellite data center application. SpaceX is pushing for equitable treatment and consistent review of both companies' plans.

title: Has oil crisis trumped US? Inside the war-time paradox of fighting Iran and funding it
content: The US faces a paradox in its conflict with Iran, relying on the nation's oil to stabilize global markets while simultaneously trying to weaken it.  Disruptions through the Strait of Hormuz and attacks on energy infrastructure have sent prices soaring, forcing Washington to ease sanctions on Iranian crude. This move offers temporary relief but highlights the limited options available.

title: 'Dhurandhar' day 3: Ranveer Singh film nets Rs 240 cr; eyes to cross Rs 300 cr globally
content: Directed by Aditya Dhar, the high-octane sequel 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is rewriting box office history, netting a staggering Rs. 246.99 crore in just 60 hours. Following the massive success of the 2025 original, the Ranveer Singh-starrer opened to a record-breaking Rs. 102.55 crore on Day 1, maintaining an iron grip on the domestic market despite its sprawling 3-hour and 49-minute runtime. Upped by the festive Ugadi and Gudi Padwa window, the espionage thriller has seen a massive Saturday surge, with Day 3 morning shows alone raking in Rs. 20.72 crore across 6,622 screenings.

title: Google announces it is shutting down Firebase Studio, less than a year after its launch
content: Google is shutting down its Firebase Studio AI workspace on March 22, 2027, less than a year after its April 2025 launch. The company is consolidating its AI developer offerings, moving lessons learned into Google AI Studio and Google Antigravity. Core Firebase services remain unaffected, with a year-long transition period for users.

title: MI's playing XI for IPL 2026: Rohit to open, will Shardul Thakur make it to the 11?
content: Mumbai Indians, IPL 2026 favourites, boast a formidable squad after key T20 World Cup 2026 performances.  With a strong core and strategic auction buys like Quinton de Kock, MI aims for their sixth title.  Key players Rohit Sharma, Suryakumar Yadav, and Jasprit Bumrah are set to lead the charge, supported by impactful all-rounders and a potent bowling attack.

title: 'Condemn attack on critical infra': PM speaks to Iran prez, says 'shipping lanes must stay open'
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, condemning attacks on critical infrastructure that threaten regional stability and global supply chains. Modi reiterated the importance of open and secure shipping lanes and conveyed Eid al-Fitr and Nowruz greetings, expressing hope for peace and prosperity in the Middle East.

title: 'Wasn't easy': Anaya reveals Sanjay's role after gender-affirming surgery
content: Anaya Bangar shared emotional journey after gender-affirming surgery, saying, "This journey wasn't easy… not just for me, but for my family too." Anaya highlighted Sanjay Bangar’s evolving support, calling it "real, unconditional, and strong." Once a cricketer, Anaya reflected on early identity struggles, recalling, "I used to… say I'm a girl."

title: Pichai shares Google's new milestone for smart, affordable electricity growth; Musk replies
content: Google has achieved a significant milestone by integrating 1 GW of flexible demand into its long-term utility contracts for data centers. This capability allows the company to shift or reduce energy use during peak times, aiding grid stability and responsible growth. The move comes as AI demand fuels increased data center energy consumption.

title: Chennai soars above gridlock: Mega flyover surge set to rewrite city commute
content: Chennai is experiencing a significant flyover boom, with new elevated corridors like Anna Salai and Madhya Kailash aiming to reduce commute times and traffic congestion. While offering relief, these projects also raise concerns about construction quality, pedestrian safety, and the long-term effectiveness of flyovers in managing the city's growing traffic demands.

title: US, Israel strike Iran’s Natanz nuclear facility again; no radiation leak reported
content: The United States and Israel conducted fresh strikes on Iran's Natanz uranium-enrichment facility, escalating ongoing hostilities. Iranian officials confirmed the attack, stating there were no immediate radioactive leaks, while vowing to rebuild the infrastructure. The IAEA previously warned of potential radiological release risks from such strikes.

title: 'Cause for concern': Pakistan points to India after US calls Islamabad's nukes a threat
content: Pakistan has denied posing a nuclear threat to the US, asserting its arsenal is solely for deterrence against India.  Islamabad also dismissed being labelled a 'rogue state' by an Israeli envoy.  US intelligence chief Tulsi Gabbard had listed Pakistan alongside Iran, China, Russia, and North Korea as threats due to developing missile systems capable of reaching the US homeland.

title: Oil at $175 a barrel? United Airlines CEO paints grim picture, to cut more flights
content: United Airlines is cutting unprofitable flights over the next two quarters due to anticipated prolonged high jet fuel prices linked to the Iran conflict. Despite this, strong travel demand allows US carriers to raise fares, with United planning a roughly five percentage point capacity reduction this year.

title: KKR injury woes worsen, Akash Deep also ruled out of IPL 2026
content: Earlier, Harshit Rana was also ruled out of the season due to the injury that he had sustained during a warm-up match ahead of the recently concluded T20 World Cup.

title: ‘Maharashtra Epstein Files’: Nashik astrologer rape case triggers political storm
content: A self-proclaimed spiritual leader, Ashok Kharat, has been arrested in Maharashtra on sexual assault charges, with the Opposition drawing parallels to the 'Epstein files' due to alleged videos of him assaulting women. His alleged links to ruling alliance politicians have intensified political scrutiny, prompting the formation of an SIT to investigate.

title: IPL 2026: KKR asked to fix Rinku Singh 'problem'
content: Irfan Pathan expresses concern over Rinku Singh's recent form slump ahead of IPL 2026, highlighting his struggles post-2023 breakthrough and at the T20 World Cup. Pathan also points to Varun Chakravarthy's inconsistent performance as a key challenge for Kolkata Knight Riders, though he believes the spinner can bounce back in familiar conditions.

title: India's oil, LPG lifeline: 2 more tankers set to cross Strait of Hormuz - full arrival list
content: India sees a cautious easing of maritime movement as three crude oil tankers successfully navigated the Strait of Hormuz, with two more LPG tankers preparing to follow. This comes after diplomatic engagements with Iran, ensuring safe passage for Indian vessels amidst regional tensions. The successful transits underscore India's commitment to securing unhindered movement for its fleet.

title: 'Moral cowardice': Cong slams Centre as Iran war drags on; fires 4 posers at PM Modi
content: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh has accused Prime Minister Narendra Modi of 'moral cowardice and political betrayal' over the Centre's silence on the US-Israel conflict with Iran. Ramesh highlighted the government's lack of condemnation or diplomatic initiative to de-escalate tensions, questioning the PM's inaction despite his recent visit to Israel and claimed friendships.

title: Will India resume buying Iranian oil? Refiners eye crude return as US grants waiver
content: Indian refiners are considering resuming Iranian crude oil purchases following a temporary US sanctions waiver. This move aims to ease an energy crunch caused by Middle East supply disruptions, with millions of barrels of Iranian crude already in transit. Clarification on payment terms from Washington is awaited before finalising shipments.

title: Massive bloodbath at Dalal Street as Iran tensions intensify, what should investors do?
content: Global markets are experiencing volatility due to the Middle East conflict, leading to significant investor wealth erosion. Experts advise retail investors to remain patient and avoid panic-driven decisions, emphasizing that short-term market swings are normal. India's strong economic fundamentals and robust capital markets support a long-term investment perspective.

title: New Vanguard of seas! All about stealth frigate 'Taragiri' to be commissioned on April 3
content: India's naval prowess is set to surge with the commissioning of the stealth frigate Taragiri on April 3. This advanced warship, boasting over 75% indigenous content, signifies a major stride in 'Make in India' and self-reliance.  Equipped with cutting-edge weapons and stealth technology, Taragiri enhances India's maritime defence capabilities significantly.

title: Kerala doctor stabbed 27 times with scissors by school teacher in hospital
content: A Kerala court has handed a life sentence to G Sandeep, a 42-year-old teacher, for the brutal murder of Dr Vandana Das in May 2023. He received an additional 30 years for other offenses. The 23-year-old doctor was fatally stabbed with surgical scissors. The court rejected claims of schizophrenia, deeming the attack premeditated. Dr.

title: Nations all set for crucial discussions at WTO MC14, GTRI flags fault lines
content: Trade ministers convene for WTO's MC14 in Cameroon, facing deep divisions on key issues like e-commerce, agriculture, and fisheries subsidies. Limited outcomes are expected as developing nations, including India, push to preserve policy space against developed countries' demands for broader liberalization.

title: IPL 2026: Shubman Gill’s World Cup snub ‘will fire him up’, says Pujara
content: Cheteshwar Pujara believes Shubman Gill's T20 World Cup snub will fuel a stellar IPL 2026, urging him to boost his strike rate. Pujara hails Gujarat Titans' formidable top order, featuring Gill, Sudharsan, and Buttler, as key to their title aspirations. He also highlights the team's all-round depth and potent pace attack.

title: Another Bihar bridge at risk of collapse: Vikramshila Setu pillar shield severely damaged
content: The Vikramshila Setu bridge, a vital link in Bihar, is showing alarming signs of structural damage. Protective walls around its pillars are collapsing, indicating distress. This critical bridge faces relentless traffic, pushing it to its limits. While authorities manage congestion, the visible damage to pillar protections demands urgent attention.

title: FPIs remain net sellers this week, withdrew Rs 35,475 crore from Dalal Street
content: Foreign portfolio investors continued their withdrawal from Dalal Street this week, with net outflows reaching Rs 35,475 crore. Middle East tensions and elevated crude oil prices have fueled investor caution, leading to a risk-off approach. This sustained selling trend marks the highest monthly outflow for 2026 so far.

title: MS Dhoni signs, Sanju Samson refuses — CSK's new star wins hearts with classy gesture
content: Sanju Samson's humility shone as he joined MS Dhoni at a CSK event, declining to sign a bat until Dhoni encouraged him. Fresh off a T20 World Cup win, Samson expressed excitement about learning from Dhoni and playing for CSK, anticipating an emotional opening match against his former team, Rajasthan Royals.

title: From Germany to Pakistan: How Hormuz tensions are hitting economies
content: The Middle East conflict's fourth week is impacting global economies, with nations like Germany, Italy, Britain, Japan, and India facing significant energy cost pressures and supply chain vulnerabilities.  Iran's role in the Strait of Hormuz is a key concern.  Countries are implementing austerity and cost-control measures amid rising inflation and currency depreciation.

title: US names Colombian President Gustavo Petro as 'priority target'
content: Colombian President Gustavo Petro has been named a “priority target” by the US Drug Enforcement Administration as federal prosecutors in New York examine alleged links between him and drug traffickers. The probe, based on informant inputs and ongoing questioning of traffickers, includes claims of cartel connections, bribery attempts to block extraditions, and misuse of law enforcement channels. Petro has denied all allegations, and officials say no direct criminal link has been established so far.

title: Virat Kohli fires ‘it’s going to get tougher’ warning as RCB gear up for IPL 2026
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru kick off their IPL 2026 title defence on March 28 against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Virat Kohli, fresh from practice, urged his team to maintain intensity for another successful campaign. Head coach Andy Flower expressed confidence in the squad, while Kohli eyes becoming the first to score 9,000 IPL runs.

title: Mathura cow vigilante run over by truck during chase; scuffle erupts between locals, police
content: A prominent gau sevak, 'Farsa Wale Baba', died after his vehicle was hit by a truck on the Agra-Delhi highway in Mathura. The incident, occurring during a suspected cattle smuggling chase, led to protests, stone-pelting, and traffic disruption. Authorities later cleared the jam and are investigating the accident.

title: Aligarh cop sexually harasses rape survivor before filing rape case; suspended
content: An Aligarh police constable has been suspended and booked for allegedly demanding sexual favors from a 25-year-old rape survivor. The constable, Imran Khan, reportedly told the survivor she would only receive help if she met him in a hotel and had sex with him. He also threatened to send her to jail if she reported his misconduct.

title: Gurgaon gets NCR’s 1st LPG vending machine; know all about it
content: Gurgaon unveils India's first LPG ATM, a smart vending machine dispensing lightweight composite cylinders in minutes. This contactless system offers a quick refill solution for residents, allowing 24/7 access and easy digital payment. The pilot project by BPCL aims to enhance convenience and promote the use of modern, safer gas cylinders.

title: 5 engineering students from Andhra Pradesh drown in Godavari river while clicking photo
content: Five BTech students from SRM University drowned in the Godavari River near Veleru village while taking photographs. Two students managed to swim back to safety after the group lost balance and fell into the deep water. Authorities, including SDRF teams, are conducting an intensive search for the three remaining missing students.

title: Inside Qeshm: How Iran turned a holiday island into a strategic missile hub
content: Once a tourist destination, Qeshm Island in the Strait of Hormuz has transformed into a strategic military fortress, housing underground missile facilities. Its size and location are crucial for Iran's naval strategy, enabling control over vital oil and gas transport routes. Recent escalations have impacted civilian life, with airstrikes damaging a desalination plant.

title: Will Putin cut Iran loose for Ukraine? What Russian envoy said on quid pro quo claims
content: Russia has vehemently denied reports suggesting a quid pro quo offer to the US: halting intelligence sharing with Iran in exchange for reduced pressure on Ukraine. Russian officials, including envoy Kirill Dmitriev, labelled the claims as 'fake' and 'Western disinformation.' The alleged proposal, reportedly made to former Trump administration envoys, was also said to have been rejected by Washington.

title: Cow vigilante’s death in Mathura: Protest by locals trigger tension
content: Taking cognisance of the cow vigilante’s death, Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath directs officials to ensure strict action against the perpetrators

title: Rupali Chakankar’s exit not enough; probe must target ‘big fish’, says Congress leader
content: Congress leader Vijay Wadettiwar alleged that attempts were underway to shield the influential people linked to the self-styled godman Ashok Kharat, who was arrested earlier this week in Nashik.

title: Assam Assembly elections 2026: TMC names candidates for 17 seats, NPP nominates three
content: National People’s Party (NPP) also fielded candidates in three seats, including AIUDF MLA Aminul Islam, who had switched sides recently

title: Odissi dancer Madhumita Raut dies of cardiac arrest
content: Her works included compositions on poetry, choreographic compositions on poems of Goethe, and fusion dances with Balinese dancer Dia Tantri in the Netherlands

title: Illegal samosa making unit busted in Hyderabad’s Jiyaguda; stale eggs, used cooking oil seized
content: The unit was being run without mandatory clearances, including an FSSAI licence, trade licence, or fire safety certification

title: Kerala CM blames successive Congress, BJP governments at Centre for India’s cooking gas crisis
content: Pinarayi Vijayan says the Congress in 2006, and later the BJP, ‘capitulated to American imperialism’ by repeatedly rejecting proposed India-Iran gas pipeline

title: Air India, IndiGo, SpiceJet oppose government’s 60% free seat selection decision
content: The Federation of Indian Airlines (FIA), which represents the three airlines, has also urged the Civil Aviation Ministry to take steps to withdraw the decision.

title: Telangana Budget FY2026-27: Government announces Indiramma Family Life Insurance scheme, ₹5 lakh each to 1.15 crore families
content: Deputy Chief Minister and Finance Minister Mallu Bhatti Vikramarka in his 2026-27 budget speech on Friday (March 20, 2026) announced the launch of the insurance scheme.

title: Businessman loses ₹15.4 crore in digital arrest scam
content: The caller who identified himself as K. Siva Subramanyam, alleged that Mr. Saraf was found to have dealing with Naresh Goel of Jet Airways and was involved in money laundering

title: CM Revanth to release first instalment of Rythu Bharosa on March 22, inaugurate oil palm factory in Siddipet
content: The second instalment of ₹2,650 crore will be released on April 9 or 10, and the balance ₹2,860 crore will be credited as the third instalment before April end

title: Reranking the 32 men's teams left in March Madness
content: And then there were just 32. How do these teams stack up against each other after surviving the first round?

title: Men's March Madness: Previews for all of Saturday's games
content: From Michigan vs. Saint Louis to Arkansas vs. High Point, here are the keys that could decide every game.

title: Florida starts title defense with 59-point pounding
content: Florida began its national title defense with the second-largest victory margin in NCAA tournament history, pounding Prairie View A&M 114-55.

title: Reed in rare air with 31-27 night as UConn escapes
content: Tarris Reed Jr. had one of the most dominant performances in NCAA tournament history, posting 31 points and 27 rebounds to help No. 2 seed UConn stave off an upset with an 82-71 win over Furman.

title: Miami (Ohio)'s run ends in blowout loss to Vols
content: Ja'Kobi Gillespie hit six 3-pointers and scored 29 points as sixth-seeded Tennessee ended a fabulous season for Miami (Ohio) with a 78-56 win in the first round of the NCAA tournament.

title: 'Drug transactions' allegedly on Holloway's phone
content: Prosecutors allege "drug transactions" were found on Crimson Tide basketball star Aden Holloway's phone after he was arrested on a felony drug charge, according to documents obtained by ESPN.

title: Clark grins and bears lost tooth in UCLA's win
content: UCLA's Skyy Clark shook off the pain after losing a chunk of his top front tooth late in Friday's first-round game against UCF and helped the Bruins secure a 75-71 victory.

title: Caldwell takes blame as Lady Vols drop 8th straight
content: Seventh-seeded NC State beat 10th-seeded Tennessee in the first round of the NCAA tournament Friday, handing the Lady Vols their eighth straight loss.

title: 📸 Men's NCAA tourney first-round superlatives
content: What were the coolest, weirdest and most notable things to happen in the men's NCAA tournament's first round? We've got some of the best right here.

title: Women's March Madness Day 1 takeaways: Chalk reigns as better seeds go 16-0
content: We broke down all 16 games, including a triple-double, Tennessee's historic end to its season and a lot of chalk.

title: Dusty May, Josh Schertz friendship adds intrigue to Michigan-Saint Louis matchup
content: After years of exchanging ideas and scouting notes, coaches Dusty May and Josh Schertz meet with a Sweet 16 berth on the line.

title: 'They're not even close': Why a Giannis trade might be even more complicated this summer
content: As the Giannis trade watch enters another offseason, a rare ownership structure and financial turmoil have left opposing teams wondering: Who's in charge here?

title: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake in 11-game Super Saturday?
content: Here's what is on the line in each contest. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings, more.

title: Purdue's Smith leaps Hurley as NCAA assists king
content: Purdue's Braden Smith broke Bobby Hurley's NCAA all-time assists record Friday night, reaching 1,077 for his career during a first-round NCAA tournament game against Queens University.

title: Why Kenny Pickett was drawn to Panthers by coach Dave Canales
content: Pickett hopes his time in Carolina leads to his "ultimate goal" of getting a starting job in the NFL again.

title: After letting the Super Bowl MVP walk, what's the Seahawks' plan at running back?
content: Kenneth Walker's departure leaves a hole in a backfield already weakened by Zach Charbonnet's injury.

title: Who's your first signing? Most annoying coach? Best city? ESPN's player survey﻿
content: LaLiga players answered ESPN's questions on everything from which one star they would sign for their team to those all-important EA FC player ratings.

title: Olney: The seven things I took away from MLB spring training
content: What did you miss at major league camps this spring while watching the World Baseball Classic? Here's what stood out to us from Florida and Arizona.

title: Men's tournament: How to bet the Duke, Michigan St. games and more Saturday
content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the second round, plus a pick for the new Eliminator game.

title: Women's tournament: UConn the odds-on title favorite as tourney tips off
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: 2026 NCAA wrestling championships: Schedule, how to watch
content: It's time for the 2026 NCAA wrestling championships! This year crowned the first women's tournament champion. Check out how to watch now.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Man City, Man United all after Tonali
content: Newcastle midfielder Sandro Tonali is a target for Premier League giants Arsenal, Manchester City and Manchester United. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Risers and fallers: Doncic stars, but is it time to drop Giannis?
content: Luka Doncic is on another planet, and Ayo Dosunmu and Daniss Jenkins are on the rise, but should fantasy basketball managers keep Giannis Antetokounmpo and Mikal Bridges rostered?

title: Potential busts to avoid in 2026
content: Who does Tristan H. Cockcroft think will underachieve in 2026? We have the names to steer clear of when drafting your rosters.

title: "God Will Punish Him": Karnataka Officer Dies by Suicide, Blames Senior
content: Mallikarjun, an assistant director in the Social Welfare Department, recorded a video before his death and sent it to his colleagues.

title: MAGA Fell In Love With A Blonde US Army Soldier. She Doesn't Exist
content: Accounts featuring AI-generated women posing as Trump-supporting soldiers and police officers have built huge audiences across social media platforms.

title: Project Costs To Pothole Complaints: Delhi Roads Set To Get QR Codes
content: The Public Works Department (PWD) has started installing QR code display boards on roads that have recently been strengthened or recarpeted.

title: PM Modi Speaks To Iran President, Stresses Need For Secure Shipping Lanes
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Saturday conveyed Eid and Nowruz greetings to the President of Iran, Masoud Pezeshkian, expressing hope that this festive season brings peace, stability and prosperity to West Asia.

title: Problems In Assam Congress That Pradyut Bordoloi's Exit Wound Revealed
content: The rupture began with a vote in the Congress presidential election when Pradyut Bordoloi backed Shashi Tharoor

title: Israel-Iran War LIVE: "Not Seeking Any Conflict With You," Iran Tells "Dear" Neighbours
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: Iran has been striking its Persian Gulf neighbours' energy facilities since the war started on February 28, and has made the Strait of Hormuz shipping channel, nearly impassable.

title: 'Once-In-500-Years Event': US Sees Record-Breaking Heat Wave
content: The heat has been toppling records this week and was set to continue into the weekend across western cities and expanding eastward.
